betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Motors & Coils§f quest covers the §6libVulpes motor family§f — §6Motor§f (tier 1), §6Advanced Motor§f (tier 2), §6Enhanced Motor§f (tier 3), and §6Elite Motor§f (tier 4) — plus the §6Copper Coil§f component. Motors are the §6mechanical heart§f of every AR multiblock, providing rotation, torque, and §6internal processing power§f for the machines.

§6Production Path (libVulpes motor recipes)§f:
- §6Motor§f (libvulpes:motor, tier 1):
  - Vanilla crafting recipe: 1x §6Copper Coil§f (libvulpes:coil0:4), 1x §6Steel Plate§f, 1x §6Steel Rod§f
  - Used in: Lathe, Rolling Machine, CO2 Scrubber, Oxygen Vent, Cutting Machine, etc.
- §6Advanced Motor§f (libvulpes:advancedmotor, tier 2):
  - Requires §6Advanced Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:2), §6Steel Rods§f, §6Steel Plate§f
  - Used in: Satellites, advanced AR machines
- §6Enhanced Motor§f (libvulpes:enhancedmotor, tier 3):
  - Requires §6Tracking Circuit§f, §6Steel Rods§f, §6Steel Plate§f
  - Used in: Precision machines, space station components
- §6Elite Motor§f (libvulpes:elitemotor, tier 4):
  - Requires §6Advanced Circuit§f, §6Tracking Circuit§f, §6Titanium Rods§f
  - Used in: Endgame machines, Black Hole Generator
- §6Copper Coil§f (libvulpes:coil0:4): the §6core component§f of every motor, crafted from §6copper ingots§f and §6redstone§f

The motor family is the §6most-demanded component§f in the AR progression — every multiblock machine requires 1-2 motors, and the §6Satellite Builder§f (10039) requires 1 motor of any tier.

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Satellite Builder§f (10039), the §6CO2 Scrubber§f (10050), the §6Oxygen Vent§f (10051), the §6Black Hole Generator§f (10083), and the §6Bionic Leg Upgrade§f (chain). The motors are the §6core ingredient§f of nearly every AR machine.

§eTip§f: Set up a §6mass-production line§f for §6Copper Coils§f first — they are the §6bottleneck ingredient§f for every motor tier. Use a §6Hopper§f chain feeding a §6Crafting Table§f with §6autocrafting§f from §6AE2§f or §6Refined Storage§f to keep motors in steady supply. The §6Elite Motor§f is the §6rarest§f — only build 2-3 unless you have a surplus of §6Advanced Circuits§f and §6Tracking Circuits§f.
